info.name: tbsosick
info.description: Organized Postman collection grouped by modules with clear request docs. Base prefix: /api/v1.

item.name: Auth Module

request.description:
Start Google OAuth login.

Authentication: Public.
Behavior: Redirects to Google consent screen with email/profile scopes.
On success: Google will call the callback endpoint to finalize login.

Handle Google OAuth callback and finalize sign‑in.

Authentication: Public; invoked by Google.
Behavior: Exchanges Google code for tokens and creates/returns user session.
Success 200: Returns accessToken, refreshToken, and user.

Logout current user and invalidate tokens.

Authentication: Bearer token required.
Behavior: Revokes active session (access/refresh tokens).
Success 200: Confirmation message.

Request a password reset OTP via email.

Implementation:
- Route: src/app/modules/auth/auth.route.ts
- Controller: auth.controller.ts → forgetPassword
- Service: auth.service.ts → forgetPasswordToDB

Verify OTP code sent to email.

Implementation:
- Route: src/app/modules/auth/auth.route.ts
- Controller: auth.controller.ts → verifyEmail
- Service: auth.service.ts → verifyEmailToDB

Reset password using a valid reset token.

Implementation:
- Route: src/app/modules/auth/auth.route.ts
- Controller: auth.controller.ts → resetPassword
- Service: auth.service.ts → resetPasswordToDB

Change current user password.

Authentication: Bearer token required.
Request Body:
- oldPassword (string)
- newPassword (string, must meet security rules)
Success 200: Password changed; re‑authenticate recommended.

Resend email verification message.

Authentication: Public.
Request Body: email (string).
Success 200: Verification email queued if account needs verification.

Exchange refresh token for a new access token.

Authentication: Refresh token (cookie/body).
Success 200: Returns fresh accessToken.
Notes: If refresh token is invalid/expired, returns 401.

item.description: Authentication endpoints including login, OAuth, logout, and token flows.

item.name: User Module

request.description:
Get the currently authenticated user’s profile.

Authentication: Bearer token required (any role).
Success 200: Returns user details and settings.

Update current user profile and optional file uploads.

Authentication: Bearer token required.
Content‑Type: multipart/form‑data (for files).
Editable fields may include name, avatar, preferences.
Success 200: Returns updated user.

item.name: Get specific user details by ID (super admin)

request.description:
Get a specific user by ID (admin).

Authentication: SUPER_ADMIN required.
Path: :id — target user ID.
Success 200: Returns user details.

item.name: Public user details (guest allowed) — rate limited

request.description:
Fetch public‑safe details for a user by ID.

Authentication: Guest allowed.
Path: :id — target user ID.
Rate limiting: Enabled.
Success 200: Returns non‑sensitive profile fields.

item.description: User profile and admin user management endpoints.

request.description:
Purpose: List notifications
Method: GET
URL: {{BASE_URL}}/api/v1/notifications/
Notes: POSTER/TASKER roles.

Purpose: Read notification
Method: PATCH
URL: {{BASE_URL}}/api/v1/notifications/:id/read
Notes: POSTER/TASKER roles.

Purpose: Read all notifications
Method: PATCH
URL: {{BASE_URL}}/api/v1/notifications/read-all
Notes: POSTER/TASKER roles.

Purpose: Admin notifications
Method: GET
URL: {{BASE_URL}}/api/v1/notifications/admin
Notes: SUPER_ADMIN only.

Purpose: Admin read notification
Method: PATCH
URL: {{BASE_URL}}/api/v1/notifications/admin/:id/read
Notes: SUPER_ADMIN only.

Purpose: Admin read all
Method: PATCH
URL: {{BASE_URL}}/api/v1/notifications/admin/read-all
Notes: SUPER_ADMIN only.

item.name: Get single legal page by id

request.description:
Register a new user account.  
Request Body: name, email, password.  
Validation: Email uniqueness; password strength policy.  
Rate limiting: Enabled to prevent abuse.  
Success 201: Returns created user (without password).

exec: console.warn("Login failed or accessToken not found!");

request.description:
Login a user and issue tokens.

Authentication: Public (no token required).

Request Body:

- email (string, required)
    
- password (string, required)
    

Success 200: Returns accessToken, refreshToken, and user profile.  
Errors: 400 invalid credentials, 429 too many attempts.
